query: An analyst requests bulk export of customer PII (names, emails, phone numbers) from the customer database for analysis.

policy_registry.POL-501: PII export requires explicit privacy approval from Legal and CISO sign-off
policy_registry.POL-502: Data minimization: export only non-sensitive attributes unless business-critical
policy_registry.POL-503: PII exports must have audit logging and 30-day retention limit

gold_output.reason: Data analyst role can export, but requires Legal approval (POL-501). Recommend de-identification to hashed emails only (POL-502). Audit logging configured (POL-503).
